canonical_objects.profile_src: raw pointwise leading source profile, where rho^(1/2) statements live
canonical_objects.ev_minus_half: coefficient in the lower-root trace basis rho^(-1/2) cos(varphi/2), rho^(-1/2) sin(varphi/2)
canonical_objects.src_weighted_profile: quantity entering Y_-3 after weight multiplication

resolution_rule: Interpret existing rho^(1/2) source statements as raw-profile statements, not as literal lower-root trace coefficients.
repository_policy: Use ev_{-1/2} only for coefficients in the fixed lower-root basis.
Use profile_src for leading pointwise source formulae.
Use Y_-3 or src_weighted_profile for norm-level quantities.
safe_consequences: Existing Phase 3 basis and projector artifacts remain usable.
The r0^(7/2) norm scaling remains intact.
Future kappa_src extraction must include an explicit raw-profile-to-trace conversion step.
